overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character ascends stairs and navigates through urban plazas, streets, and corridors with holographic advertisements and neon storefronts.

events.description: character begins ascending the wide concrete stairs
reaching top of stairs, plaza opens up to upper level

agents.ego_description: character walking up wide concrete stairs toward upper plaza level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking down stairs
pedestrian standing at top of stairs near plaza entrance

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to plaza level with multiple steps
tall dark buildings with illuminated windows and balconies
green glowing holographic billboard visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase in a futuristic urban plaza at night. The environment features dark buildings with illuminated windows and a green holographic display visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrians move up and down the stairs as the character climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with holographic tourist information

events.description: character turns right past the tourist information hologram
moving from open plaza onto street with red painted curbs

agents.ego_description: character walks past tourist information hologram and continues along the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket standing near illuminated palm tree
pedestrian in pink outfit walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large green holographic display showing map and text reading TOURIST INFORMATION
palm tree with bright yellow uplighting at its base
red painted curb along the edge of the street
tall pole with bright overhead light illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character walks past a large green TOURIST INFORMATION hologram and an illuminated palm tree. The scene transitions from the open plaza to a street with red curbs and overhead street lamps. Various pedestrians are scattered throughout the area, including one in a distinctive pink outfit crossing the plaza.

events.description: entering area with more intense neon signage and colored lighting
turning corner into narrower covered corridor with trash piles

agents.ego_description: character walks along sidewalk passing neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian running past storefront with neon lights
pedestrian in red hat standing near wall

entered.detail: building facade with purple and green neon lights framing entrance
large illuminated advertisement displaying beverage can with text IT'S BIG
yellow circular neon sign reading OPEN in window
piled garbage bags and debris on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a commercial corridor lined with neon-lit storefronts and advertisements, including a prominent IT'S BIG billboard. The environment becomes more enclosed with building overhangs providing shelter, and trash bags are visible along the right sidewalk. The lighting is dominated by colorful neon signs in green and purple hues.

events.description: approaching underpass with view of distant illuminated skyscrapers
emerging from covered area to see distant skyline through underpass

agents.ego_description: character continues through corridor approaching an underpass with skyscrapers visible ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward underpass in the distance

entered.detail: concrete overpass creating tunnel-like passage ahead
tall illuminated towers visible through the underpass opening
red and white striped barriers along the left side of street
metal fencing with tarps covering construction area

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a covered urban corridor approaching an underpass structure. Construction barriers line the left side of the path while distant illuminated skyscrapers become visible through the underpass ahead. The environment maintains a dark, atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic with artificial lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open urban plaza into a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor that eventually leads toward a distant city underpass. It begins with the character ascending a wide concrete staircase under the glow of dark buildings and a distant green hologram. As the character reaches the upper level, the scene opens up to a street featuring a large tourist information hologram and an illuminated palm tree, where pedestrians scatter across a plaza with red curbs. The camera then shifts into a more enclosed commercial corridor, moving past colorful purple and green neon storefronts and a prominent billboard while passing trash bags along the sidewalk. Finally, the path narrows under building overhangs and construction barriers, guiding the character toward an underpass that frames a view of illuminated skyscrapers in the distance.
